summary: This document describes the rules Account Abstraction protocols should follow, during the validation phase of Account Abstraction transactions, such as [ERC-4337](./eip-4337) `UserOperation` or RIP-7560 (Native Account Abstraction), which are enforced off-chain by a block builder or a standalone bundler, and the rationale behind each one of them.
title: Account Abstraction Validation Scope Rules
